spec_match.rationale: The probe now checks the actual local-recognition contract: processLocally, SpeechRecognition.available({ langs, processLocally: true, quality }), install() presence, and permissions-policy state.

interactive.rationale: Features a functional 'Run Capability Probe' button that executes live checks and updates the UI in real-time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Still partial because the lede claims a recognition trial, but the repaired local pack check no longer relies on UA version or unrelated properties.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully handles missing APIs, permission query failures, and secure context checks with clear UI fallbacks.

references.rationale: The parent index.html contains the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Consistently uses design system CSS variables, layout utilities, and semantic buttons with matching text/background states.

openQuestions.title: Re-review repaired live probe in chrome-devtools-mcp
openQuestions.detail: The live probe or copyable feature-detection snippet was repaired on 2026-06-04. Re-run this route in chrome-devtools-mcp, exercise the visible controls, and verify the repaired probe output plus console/network state before marking the critique fully current.

openQuestions.title: Implement recognition trial as claimed in blurb
openQuestions.detail: The page header states that the probe 'attempts a brief recognition trial to confirm each tier actually works', but no recognition is actually started. A brief, silent SpeechRecognition session should be initiated to verify that the API doesn't throw errors when started with different quality tiers.

summary: 2026-06-04 maintenance replaced inaccurate live-probe logic with feature-specific checks; chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable in this session, so browser click-through re-review is still required.
